main_flow_convergence_verdict: Evidence advances dependencies and blockers, but does not yet prove canonical Main Flow runtime readiness, model visibility, or production candidate generation.
schema_enforcement_notes: Lane 4 EC2 cost-state JSON parsed but failed schema: artifacts must be an array. Treated as support/cost-control context, not schema-conformant evidence.
Lane 1 initial/post validation, Lane 2 strict-hand reference/response, Lane 4 side-push runtime files, and Lane 6 manifest are non-schema support artifacts.
